channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine's Senate race and much more. Here are the primary contests to watch today
item.description: Republican incumbents face tough challenges in Maine and Nevada, while a crowded field of MAGA-aligned Republicans compete in South Carolina.

item.title: GLP-1s appear to protect against cancer. Researchers are trying to figure out how
item.description: Recent studies suggest GLP-1 drugs for weight loss and diabetes may prevent cancer and slow its progression. Researchers are investigating the mechanisms.

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Israel and Iran have agreed to temporarily halt strikes, voters in four states head to the polls Tuesday for primaries, and Trump makes baseless claims about election integrity.

item.title: Supreme Court enters final stretch of term with major cases still pending
item.description: The Supreme Court is entering its busiest period as justices race to complete decisions and dissents in remaining cases.
